name: RBR Group Limited
summary: RBR Group Limited, through its subsidiaries, provides training, and local and expatriate staffing solutions. The company also offers labor, training, and professional services in Mozambique. In addition, it provides range of international qualifications and training services, as well as bespoke training programs; delivers technical, commercial, and community training programs; operates mobile training facilities; and labor broking services. Further, the company offers business development services, including market orientation, beach head strategies, contracting and business development support, and local business mentoring; corporate administration services, such as business participation, licensing of activities, registration of commercial representatives, drafting of contracts, and compliance needs analysis and corrective action implementation; and consulting and other business services. It serves oil and gas, resources/mining, construction, and logistics industries. The company was formerly known as Rubicon Resources Limited and changed its name to RBR Group Limited in November 2015. RBR Group Limited was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Perth, Australia.
